details: Compound 5a appears in paper as '2-((2-chlorophenyl)(hydroxy)methyl)cyclohex-2-en-1-one 5a' with reported 'm.p. 92-84 °C' (a transposed range preserved as written).
Table 2 of Wei 2019 lists 'nano TAGN' Tp = 511.4 K; conversion to 238.25 °C is correct.
Compound 3a in paper: '3,5-Di(aminoxymethyl)-2,6-diphenyl-4H-pyran-4-one (3a). Colourless crystals (91.5% yield), m.p. 127-129°C'.
Compound 5c: '2-((2,4-Dichlorobenzyl)thio)-5-(1-methyl-3-(trifluoromethyl)-1H-pyrazol-4-yl)-1,3,4-oxadiazole (5c) Mp. 101-103 °C, white solid, yield 92.9%'.
Table 2 of Khan 2017 lists Piroxicam-Nicotinamide cocrystal melting point (1:2) = 158-160 °C.
Paper: '4b: A white solid in 64% yield; Mp: 64-68 °C' for the TBDPS mycophenolic acid analogue.
Paper Table lists ethanol BP (Exp.) = 78.3 °C, a measured experimental value from the cited dataset used in QSPR study.
Compound 12a: '(10R*,10aR*)-N-Cyclohexyl-10-hydroxy-5-oxo-10-phenyl-... (12a). Black solid (93%, 730 mg). M.p. = 182-183 °C'.
Compound (E)-7h: '2-Methyl-4-phenyl-8-[(2E)-2-propylidenehydrazino]-2H-1,2,3-benzothiadiazine 1,1-dioxide [(E)-7h]... Mp 138-139 °C (EtOH)'.
Paper: Disodium N,N-bis(diphenylphosphinomethyl)-2-aminoethylphosphonate, 'filtered and dried in vacuo at 50°C. Mp >300°C'.
Bicyclic 8 prepared by dehydrofluorination of 7: 'A white solid, mp >277 °C dec., (0.28 g, >95% yield) was obtained'.
Table 1 of Fini 2010 lists Di-ethanolamine (DEA) salt of diclofenac, Tpeak of salt melting = 130 °C (form obtained from water).
Compound 4b: '2-Ethoxycarbonylamino-N-(4-methoxyphenyl)benzamide (4b): Brown crystals from ethanol; m.p. 133-134 °C; yield 80%'.
Compound 3c: '4-(6'-(Thiophen-2''-yl)pyridazin-3'-yl)benzaldehyde 3c. Yellow solid (15%). Mp: 214-216 °C'.
Compound 8d (free base): 'Base 8d was obtained in 58% yield, m.p. 154-156°C (methanol)'.
Compound 9g: '(E)-6-Phenylethylenyl salicylic acid (9g, 70.8 mg, 92%) was obtained... Mp 130-132 °C'.
Compound 4c: 'Ethyl (E)-1-(2-(4-methoxyphenyl)-2-oxoethylidene)-2,5-dioxo-...-pyrimidine-3-carboxylate (4c)... Yellow solid; 2.08 g, 87 % yield; m.p. 253-254 °C (acetonitrile)'.

Compound 10e: 'The general procedure A was followed using 4-methoxybenzaldehyde 5e (10 mmol, 1.5 mL), heated to reflux for 24 h affording 3.40 g (65%) of 10e as a yellow solid, mp 212-213°C (ethyl acetate/hexane)'.
Compound 4: 'N-(4-Hydroxy-2-methylquinolin-6-yl)-N'-phenylthiourea (4)... Yield 1.30 g (85%), mp 325°C (decomp.)'.
Compound 8d: '2-(2-Cyanophenylhydrazono)-1-(2-furyl)-3-phenylhydrazono-1-propanone (8d): Orange crystals from ethanol: m.p. 229°C; yield 78% (method A), 80% (method B)'.
Compound 2b: '8-(4-(2-(5'-(Methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)ethyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-1-yl)octane-1-thiol (2b). Yield 44%; brown yellowish solid; C 21 H 29 N 3 S 5 ; mp: 79-81 °C'.
Derivative 9 (1-(2,4-Difluorophenyl)-2-(2-nitro-1H-imidazol-1-yl)ethanol) reported: 'melting point: 184-186 °C'.
Table 8 row '4. 2. propanol 82.30 85.83 -3.53 -4.28 84.11 (-1.81)' confirms 2-propanol experimental BP = 82.30 °C.
Compound 5l: '6-(4,5-dimethoxy-2-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene (5l). Yield: 87%; Mp: 170 °C'.
Compound 15e: '2-(1-(2-Oxo-2-((1,2,3,4-tetrahydroacridin-9-yl)amino)ethyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)ethyl 2-((4-methyl-2-oxo-2H-chromen-7-yl)oxy)acetate (15e). Yield 69%, white solid, mp 160-162 °C'.
